REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC AND HSBC BANK USA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION FOR PLAINTIFFS TO (1) JOIN THE CO-BORROWER; (2) ALLEGE FACTS GIVING RISE TO PLAINTIFF CERALDE (NOT PARTY TO THE CONTRACT AND NOT A BORROWER) STANDING TO BRING CAUSES OF ACTION ARISING OUT THE CONTRACT AND BASED ON STATUTES; (3) ALLEGE FACTS GIVING RISE TO PLAINTIFFS' STATUTORY CLAIMS AS OWNERS OCCUPYING THE PREMISES AS THEIR PRINCIPAL RESIDENCE; (4) TO ALLEGE TENDER OR TO REMOVE THE QUIET TITLE CLAIM AS TO "ALL PERSONS KNOWN OR UNKNOWN CLAIMING ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RIGHT, TITLE, ESTATE, LIEN OR INTEREST" WHICH IS SOUGHT IN ADDITION TO QUIETING TITLE AS TO THE NAMED DEFENDANTS. THE COURT NOTES THAT "ALL PERSONS KNOWN" MAY INCLUDE THE ORIGINAL BENEFICIARIES UNDER THE DEED OF TRUST, WHO ARE NOT PARTIES TO THE ACTION, BUT ARE CLAIMED TO HAVE ENGAGED IN A WRONGDOING AT ORIGINATION. TO THE EXTENT DEFENDANT ARGUES THAT THE CAUSES OF ACTION ARE OTHERWISE INSUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED, THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFFS' CAUSES OF ACTION ARE IN PART BASED ON THE ALLEGATIONS THAT THE DEED OF TRUST HAS NOT BEEN PROPERLY ASSIGNED TO THE FORECLOSING BENEFICIARY DUE TO ASSIGNEE'S EXECUTION OF THE ASSIGNMENT DOCUMENTS. THESE ALLEGATIONS ARE SUFFICIENT TO SUPPORT CAUSES OF ACTION BASED ON THEM. . GHUMAN V. WELLS FARGO (2013) 989 F. SUPP.2D 994 CITED BY THE MOVING PARTY IS NOT ON POINT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2017 Continued To Nov-29-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC and HSBC BANK USA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to all causes of action for Plaintiffs to (1) join the co-borrower; (2) allege facts giving rise to Plaintiff Ceralde (not party to the contract and not a borrower) standing to bring causes of action arising out the contract and based on statutes; (3) allege facts giving rise to Plaintiffs' statutory claims as owners occupying the Premises as their principal residence; (4) to allege tender or to remove the quiet title claim as to "all persons known or unknown claiming any legal or equitable right, title, estate, lien or interest" which is sought in addition to quieting title as to the named Defendants. The Court notes that "all persons known" may include the original beneficiaries under the Deed of Trust, who are not parties to the action, but are claimed to have engaged in a wrongdoing at origination. To the extent Defendant argues that the causes of action are otherwise insufficiently alleged, the demurrer is overruled. Plaintiffs' causes of action are in part based on the allegations that the Deed of Trust has not been properly assigned to the foreclosing beneficiary due to assignee's execution of the assignment documents. These allegations are sufficient to support causes of action based on them. . Ghuman v. Wells Fargo (2013) 989 F. Supp.2d 994 cited by the moving party is not on point. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2017 Continued To Sep-27-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Continued To Aug-10-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tanya McCullah, Esq. (714-848-7920 ext 323) for Defendant/Moving party SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC, HSBC BANK USA through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. No Argument. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC, HSBC BANK USA, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address in good faith all issues raised by demurrer. The Court notices that Plaintiff failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and Court's February 14, 2017 order re: courtesy copies. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2017 Continued To Apr-05-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-14-2017 Continued To Mar-14-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC, HSBC BANK USA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Continued to March 14, 2017. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition. Courtesy copies must be delivered to department 501 no later than February 28, 2017 each with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Newton J. Lam, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
